nasb.text: Then Moses and Aaron fell on their faces in the presence of all the assembly of the congregation of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Then Moses and Aaron fell on their faces before all the assembly of the congregation of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 摩西和亞倫就俯伏在以色列全體會眾面前。

ccb.text: 摩西和亚伦俯伏在以色列全体会众面前。
